title: 精いっぱい準備するぞー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm preparing for training one day, when a lone
Umamusume comes charging onto the track with
all the enthusiasm in the world.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: All right! Here I go! I'm gonna finish first for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Of course I am! Today's a scrimmage! You don't even know how much I've been looking forward to this!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run my heart out, make a name for
myself, and become a Triple Crown champion like
President Rudolf one day!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Exhale... I-I'm fine. My body and my spirit just aren't always on the same page...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
If I push myself too hard and collapse, I won't be
able to take part in the scrimmage... But I want to
make sure I'm fully ready for it.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
choice_data_list: You should warm yourself up by jogging.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! Stretches aren't too physically taxing,
and they're a great way to prevent injuries!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll start with a good ol' forward bend! Hup!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Th-that crack... I think I put a little too much
oomph into it...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I'm... fine... I'll take things a bit more slowly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, it doesn't seem like she hurt herself. I
watch over Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi like a hawk as she
does her stretches with a little more care than
before.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, warming up with a light jog sounds good!
That won't be too hard on my body either!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the suggestion! I'll get started right
away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or so she says, before taking off in a flat-out
sprint that doesn't remotely resemble a leisurely
jog.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, oops! That's right! I let my enthusiasm get the
better of me.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Let me try that again! Nice and slow! Keep it light!
